description_long: This object is a stylized, three-dimensional sign featuring the words 'Mi Óptica' integrated into the design of a large, abstract eye. The eye is formed by two sweeping, curved elements in metallic silver with bold red accents, framing the text in the center. The word 'Óptica' is rendered in bold black letters, with the 'O' stylized as a camera lens or eye, complete with a central dot and circular outline. The word 'Mi' is written in a flowing, cursive red script, positioned to the left of the main text. The overall structure is flat and elongated, with a glossy, reflective finish that gives it a modern, eye-catching appearance. There are no visible human figures, wheelchair frames, or mobility-related components present in the design.
description: A glossy, stylized sign reading 'Mi Óptica' within a red and silver abstract eye shape, featuring bold and cursive lettering. The design is flat, elongated, and highly reflective.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full 'Mi Óptica' text and the complete eye-shaped frame with red and silver accents.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin, flat profile of the sign, with minimal visible detail except the edge of the structure.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, showing the reversed text and the same eye-shaped frame, but with the text orientation flipped.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again displays the thin, flat profile, similar to view 1, with no text or eye details visible.
